headline: Home Depot Tests On Site Car Key Service To Deepen Store Relationships
summary: Home Depot (NYSE:HD) has partnered with KeyMe Locksmiths to offer on-site car key duplication services at selected stores. The new service places technology-based automotive key solutions directly inside Home Depot’s retail locations. This collaboration expands Home Depot’s in-store service offering beyond traditional home improvement products. For a company best known for lumber aisles and power tools, NYSE:HD is steadily layering in more services alongside its core retail assortment. The...
